channel.title: SafetyWarden Blog
channel.description: Practical insights on safety compliance, audits, and inspection readiness.

item.title: Factories Act Compliance in 2026: What Inspectors Look for (and How to Stay Ready)
item.author: hello@safetywarden.com (SafetyWarden Team)
item.description: Factory inspections are becoming more rigorous. Learn exactly what inspectors check and how to maintain continuous compliance under the Factories Act 1948.

item.title: ISO 45001 Internal Audits: A Practical Field Guide for EHS Teams
item.author: hello@safetywarden.com (SafetyWarden Team)
item.description: Move beyond checkbox audits. Learn how to conduct effective ISO 45001 internal audits that drive real safety improvements and prepare you for certification.

item.title: Fire Safety Audits for Factories: The Evidence Inspectors Expect on Site
item.author: hello@safetywarden.com (SafetyWarden Team)
item.description: Fire safety audits go beyond checking if extinguishers exist. Learn what documented evidence fire inspectors demand and how to maintain bulletproof compliance.

item.title: Corrective Actions That Actually Close: Fixing the #1 Failure in Safety Audits
item.author: hello@safetywarden.com (SafetyWarden Team)
item.description: Open corrective actions are the silent killer of safety programs. Learn the proven CAPA framework that achieves 95%+ closure rates and prevents recurring incidents.

item.title: Contractor Safety Management: Preventing Incidents with Daily Digital Checks
item.author: hello@safetywarden.com (SafetyWarden Team)
item.description: Contractor incidents account for 40% of workplace fatalities. Learn how daily digital checks and permit-to-work systems prevent contractor safety failures.

item.title: Permit to Work Systems: What "Good" Looks Like in High-Risk Jobs
item.author: hello@safetywarden.com (SafetyWarden Team)
item.description: Permit-to-work systems prevent fatalities in high-risk operations. Learn the 7 critical elements of effective PTW systems and common failure modes to avoid.

item.title: Near Miss Reporting: Turning "Small" Events into Big Risk Reduction
item.author: hello@safetywarden.com (SafetyWarden Team)
item.description: For every serious incident, there are 300 near misses that went unreported. Learn how to build a proactive near miss culture that prevents major incidents.

item.title: Digital Safety Audits vs Paper Checklists: ROI, Evidence, and Legal Defensibility
item.author: hello@safetywarden.com (SafetyWarden Team)
item.description: Paper checklists are slow, error-prone, and legally weak. Discover the real ROI of digital safety audits and why courts and regulators demand digital evidence.

item.title: EHS Dashboards That Work: 12 Metrics Leadership Actually Uses
item.author: hello@safetywarden.com (SafetyWarden Team)
item.description: Most EHS dashboards drown leadership in data without insight. Learn the 12 metrics that drive decisions and how to present them for maximum impact.

item.title: Incident Readiness: What to Prepare Before a Regulator or Client Audit
item.author: hello@safetywarden.com (SafetyWarden Team)
item.description: Auditors don't just check documents—they test your emergency response. Learn the 15 critical elements auditors verify and how to prepare for incident readiness audits.
